<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by vue-docgen-cli — do not edit. Source: src/components/CnSuggestFeatureModal/CnSuggestFeatureModal.vue -->

### Props

| Name      | Type     | Required | Default | Description                                                                                                                                                                         |
| --------- | -------- | -------- | ------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `repo`    | `string` | ✓        | —       | `<owner>/<repo>` to post the new issue to.                                                                                                                                          |
| `specRef` | `string` |          | `null`  | Optional kebab-case capability slug. When non-null, becomes the `specRef` field in the POST body so the issue gets a `specRef:<slug>` label and the body suffix on the GitHub side. |

### Events

| Name        | Payload | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| ----------- | ------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `close`     | —       | Emitted to request the host close the modal — fired both on a successful submit and when the user cancels.                                                                                                 |
| `submitted` | —       | Emitted after the GitHub issue was successfully created. Carries the sanitized issue payload returned by the OpenRegister proxy (`{number, title, html_url, ...}`) so the parent can show a success toast. |
